Provide design instructions for your fraternity banner layout, colors, and Greek letter placement PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Fraternity Banners for Rush Events & Greek Life Displays

Make your fraternity stand out at rush events, homecoming, and campus activities with professional vinyl banners featuring your Greek letters and custom designs. Our fraternity banners are printed on durable 13oz vinyl that withstands both indoor and outdoor use.

Perfect for:

  • Rush week recruitment displays
  • Homecoming parade banners
  • Greek life campus events
  • Fraternity house decorations
  • Alumni gatherings and reunions

Each fraternity banner includes reinforced edges and your choice of grommets or pole pockets for easy installation. Our experienced design team works with your Greek letters, fraternity colors, and custom artwork to create banners that represent your brotherhood with pride.

Available in sizes from 2'x4' up to 8'x50' with fast turnaround options available for rush deadlines and last-minute events.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Fraternity Banner Materials for Indoor & Outdoor Display

13oz Vinyl Banner Material

Our standard fraternity banners are printed on premium 13oz vinyl that delivers vibrant Greek letter colors and crisp text. This material is waterproof, fade-resistant, and perfect for both indoor rush events and outdoor homecoming displays.

Mesh Banner Material

For outdoor fraternity banners in windy locations, mesh material allows 30% air flow while maintaining your Greek letter visibility. Ideal for fence installations around fraternity houses or outdoor event spaces.

Fabric Banner Material

Premium fabric banners provide a sophisticated look for indoor fraternity events, alumni gatherings, and formal presentations. The matte finish eliminates glare under indoor lighting.

Canvas Banner Material

Heavy-duty canvas material offers maximum durability for permanent fraternity installations and long-term outdoor display of Greek letters and house logos.

All fraternity banner materials are printed with UV-resistant inks to prevent fading of your Greek letters and fraternity colors over time.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Fraternity Banner Finishing Options for Easy Installation

Grommets (Standard)

Nickel grommets every 2 feet along the top and bottom edges allow easy hanging of your fraternity banner with rope, zip ties, or bungee cords. Perfect for rush event displays and temporary installations.

Pole Pockets

Sewn pole pockets on the top and/or bottom create a professional finish for fraternity banners displayed on poles or banner stands. Available in 2" or 3" pocket sizes.

Wind Slits

Strategic cuts in your fraternity banner reduce wind resistance for outdoor installations while maintaining the integrity of your Greek letter design.

Reinforced Edges

Double-stitched hems on all sides provide extra durability for fraternity banners that will be installed and removed frequently during rush events and activities.

Custom Mounting Options

Special mounting solutions are available for unique fraternity house installations or permanent Greek letter displays.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Fraternity Banner Production & Rush Event Turnaround Times

Standard Production: 3-5 Business Days

Most custom fraternity banners with uploaded print-ready Greek letter files are produced within 3-5 business days after artwork approval.

Rush Production: 1-2 Business Days

Need your fraternity banner for an upcoming rush event? Rush production gets your Greek letter banner printed and ready to ship in 1-2 business days for an additional fee.

Same-Day Production Available

For urgent fraternity events, same-day production may be available for simple Greek letter designs. Contact our team before 10 AM CST to check availability.

Custom Design Timeline

If you need our design team to create your fraternity banner artwork, allow an additional 1-2 business days for Greek letter layout, color matching, and design approval.

Large Format Considerations

Fraternity banners larger than 6'x10' may require additional production time due to specialized printing requirements for oversized Greek letter displays.

Production time begins after final artwork approval and payment processing. All times exclude weekends and holidays.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Fraternity Banner Payment & Greek Organization Ordering

Credit Card Payments

We accept all major credit cards for immediate processing of your fraternity banner order. Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover are all accepted.

PayPal Checkout

Use your PayPal account for secure payment processing of fraternity banner orders with buyer protection included.

Fraternity Organization Accounts

Greek organizations can establish net payment terms for multiple fraternity banner orders throughout the year. Contact our team to set up organizational billing.

Purchase Orders

Educational institutions and established Greek organizations may submit purchase orders for fraternity banner orders over $500.

Split Payments

Large fraternity banner orders can be split across multiple payment methods if needed for Greek organization budgeting.

All payments are processed securely with SSL encryption to protect your fraternity's financial information.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Fraternity Banner Shipping for Rush Events & Campus Delivery

Standard Shipping (5-7 Business Days)

Ground shipping is included for most fraternity banner orders. Your Greek letter banner will arrive ready to install for your upcoming events.

Expedited Shipping Options

Rush shipping available for fraternity banners needed for urgent rush events:

  • 2-Day Express: Arrives in 2 business days
  • Overnight Express: Next business day delivery
  • Saturday delivery available for weekend fraternity events

Campus Delivery Considerations

When shipping fraternity banners to university addresses, include specific building names, Greek house addresses, and recipient contact information to ensure successful delivery.

Large Banner Shipping

Fraternity banners exceeding 8 feet in both dimensions will be folded for standard shipping. Freight shipping is available to avoid folding for large Greek letter displays.

Order Tracking

All fraternity banner shipments include tracking information so you can monitor delivery progress for your rush events and activities.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Rush Event & Greek Life Uses for Fraternity Banners

Rush Week Recruitment

Display your fraternity banners with Greek letters prominently during rush week to attract potential new members. Perfect for information tables, outdoor displays, and recruitment events.

Homecoming Parades & Campus Events

Show your Greek pride with custom fraternity banners featuring your letters, founding year, and brotherhood colors during homecoming parades and campus-wide celebrations.

Fraternity House Decoration

Enhance your chapter house with permanent or seasonal fraternity banners displaying Greek letters, mottos, and organizational achievements.

Alumni Gatherings & Reunions

Welcome returning alumni with fraternity banners celebrating decades of brotherhood, featuring Greek letters and historical imagery.

Fundraising Events & Philanthropy

Promote your fraternity's charitable activities and fundraising events with banners highlighting your Greek organization's community involvement.

Intramural Sports & Competitions

Support your fraternity teams with spirit banners featuring Greek letters and motivational messaging for campus sports leagues.

Greek Week Activities

Stand out during inter-fraternal competitions and Greek week events with eye-catching banners showcasing your fraternity's identity and achievements.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Fraternity Banner Artwork Requirements for Greek Letter Printing

File Format Requirements

Submit fraternity banner artwork in high-resolution formats:

  • PDF (preferred for Greek letter designs)
  • AI (Adobe Illustrator with outlined fonts)
  • EPS (Encapsulated PostScript)
  • High-resolution JPG or PNG (300 DPI minimum)

Greek Letter Design Guidelines

Ensure your Greek letters are clearly readable and properly sized for your banner dimensions. Minimum letter height should be 4 inches for banners viewed from 20+ feet away.

Color Requirements

Use CMYK color mode for accurate fraternity color reproduction. Provide PMS color codes for official Greek organization colors when available.

Resolution & Size Specifications

Artwork should be created at actual banner size or proportional scale with 150 DPI minimum resolution. Larger Greek letter banners require higher resolution for crisp printing.

Bleed & Safe Area Guidelines

Include 0.25" bleed area around your fraternity banner design and keep important Greek letters and text 0.5" from finished edges.

Font & Text Considerations

Convert all text to outlines or provide font files with your fraternity banner artwork. Sans-serif fonts work best for Greek letters on outdoor banners.

Design Assistance Available

Our team can help optimize your Greek letter artwork for banner printing or create custom fraternity designs based on your specifications and organizational branding.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Fraternity Banners for Your Next Greek Event

Ready to showcase your fraternity pride with a professional custom banner? Our experienced team specializes in Greek letter printing and understands the importance of representing your brotherhood with quality materials and vibrant colors.

Every fraternity banner is:

  • Printed with fade-resistant UV inks
  • Made from durable vinyl materials
  • Finished with your choice of mounting options
  • Backed by our satisfaction guarantee
  • Proudly manufactured in the USA

Whether you need banners for rush week, homecoming, or year-round fraternity house display, we deliver professional results that honor your Greek organization's standards and traditions.

Questions about your fraternity banner project? Our customer service team is available Monday-Friday 8AM-4PM CST at (320) 391-5300 or reach out anytime through our contact form.

Need a custom quote for large orders or special requirements? Request a custom fraternity banner quote for bulk pricing, special materials, or unique installation requirements.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Fraternity Banner Questions & Answers

What's the best material for outdoor fraternity banners?

13oz vinyl is our most popular choice for fraternity banners that need to withstand outdoor weather. For windy locations, mesh material allows air flow while maintaining your Greek letter visibility.

Can you match our official fraternity colors?

Yes, we can match official Greek organization colors using PMS color codes or color samples. Our printing process ensures accurate reproduction of traditional fraternity colors.

How long do fraternity banners typically last outdoors?

With proper care, vinyl fraternity banners can last 2-3 years outdoors. UV-resistant inks help prevent fading of Greek letters and organizational colors over time.

What's the largest size available for fraternity banners?

We can print fraternity banners up to 8 feet tall by 50 feet wide. Larger sizes may be available through custom quotes for special Greek organization projects.

Do you offer rush delivery for urgent fraternity events?

Yes, rush production (1-2 business days) and expedited shipping options are available for fraternity banners needed for time-sensitive rush events and activities.

Can you help design our fraternity banner if we don't have artwork?

Our design team can create custom fraternity banner layouts incorporating your Greek letters, organizational logos, colors, and messaging. Design services are available for an additional fee.

What mounting options work best for fraternity house installations?

Grommets work well for temporary displays during rush events. Pole pockets provide a cleaner look for permanent fraternity house banners displayed on poles or mounting systems.

Do you offer discounts for multiple fraternity banner orders?

Greek organizations can establish accounts for volume pricing on multiple banner orders throughout the year. Contact us to discuss fraternity organization pricing.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
